description: New York Public Library Digital Collections API. Source docs: https://api.repo.nypl.org/. Note: NYPL states the Repo API is being deprecated and will no longer be available starting August 1st, 2026.

tools.name: collections_get
tools.description: Returns paginated child captures for a collection or subcollection/container UUID. Required: uuid. Optional: page (default: 1), per_page (default: 10).

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number, starts at 1.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Rows to return per page, maximum 500.

tools.name: collections_list
tools.description: Returns paginated information about collections. Optional: q, page (default: 1), per_page (default: 10) (plus 1 more).

params.name: q
params.description: Search titles of collections or containers.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number, starts at 1.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Rows to return per page, maximum 500.

params.name: search_recursive
params.description: Whether mid-level container information is searched.

tools.name: collections_items_list-collection
tools.description: Returns items directly attached to a collection or container. Required: uuid. Optional: page (default: 1), per_page (default: 10).

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number, starts at 1.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Rows to return per page, maximum 500.

tools.name: collections_subcollections_list
tools.description: Returns immediate child containers of a collection or container; does not return items or captures. Required: uuid. Optional: page (default: 1), per_page (default: 10).

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number, starts at 1.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Rows to return per page, maximum 500.

tools.name: items_get-counts
tools.description: Returns collection item counts.

tools.name: items_get-details
tools.description: Returns MODS for a capture UUID plus related capture information. UUID must belong to a valid capture. Required: uuid. Optional: show_mods.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

params.name: show_mods
params.description: Pass no to suppress MODS data where supported.

tools.name: items_get-featured
tools.description: Returns featured items.

tools.name: items_get-mets-alto
tools.description: Returns METS ALTO for a given capture UUID. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

tools.name: items_get-minified-alto
tools.description: Returns minified ALTO for a given capture UUID. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

tools.name: items_get-mods-captures
tools.description: Returns MODS and capture information for a capture, item, container, or collection UUID. Required: uuid. Optional: show_mods.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

params.name: show_mods
params.description: Pass no to suppress MODS data where supported.

tools.name: items_get-plain-text
tools.description: Returns parsed plain text ALTO for a given capture UUID. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

tools.name: items_get-rights
tools.description: Returns rights profile information for a UUID. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

tools.name: items_get-total
tools.description: Returns the total number of digitized items.

tools.name: items_list-all-collection-captures
tools.description: Returns all capture UUIDs, image IDs, item links, and titles for a capture, item, container, or collection UUID. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

tools.name: items_list-captures
tools.description: Returns capture UUIDs, image IDs, item links, and titles for an item, container, or collection UUID. Capture UUIDs are not valid input values. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

tools.name: items_list-collection-captures
tools.description: Returns capture UUIDs, image IDs, item links, and titles for a capture, item, container, or collection UUID. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.

tools.name: items_list-recent
tools.description: Returns the most recently added captures. Optional: page (default: 1), per_page (default: 10), publicDomainOnly.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number, starts at 1.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Rows to return per page, maximum 500.

params.name: publicDomainOnly
params.description: Return only Public Domain results.

tools.name: items_list-root
tools.description: Returns all top-level UUIDs for collections and orphan items.

tools.name: items_lookup-identifier
tools.description: Returns UUIDs for a given identifier type and identifier value such as local_image_id, local_bnumber, local_barcode, oclc, isbn, or lccn. Required: type, id.

params.name: type
params.description: Identifier type.

params.name: id
params.description: Identifier value.

tools.name: items_search-digital
tools.description: Returns results matching keywords anywhere in a MODS metadata record. Supports field-specific search, fuzzy/exact field type, optional filters, pagination, and public-domain filtering. Required: q. Optional: field, ftype, filter[] (plus 3 more).

params.name: q
params.description: Search terms.

params.name: field
params.description: Optional MODS field to search, such as topic.

params.name: ftype
params.description: Field type; defaults to fuzzy.

params.name: filter[]
params.description: Optional filters on results, e.g. typeOfResource:still image.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number, starts at 1.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Rows to return per page, maximum 500.

params.name: publicDomainOnly
params.description: Return only Public Domain results.

tools.name: mods_get
tools.description: Returns MODS bibliographic data for a capture, item, container, or collection UUID. Required: uuid.

params.name: uuid
params.description: NYPL collection, container, item, or capture UUID as documented for the endpoint.
